title: Dupe Fun
description:
A simple mod that can be configured with /autodupe <option> that duplicates items when they drop.
/autodupe <option>
body:
A duplicator mod that duplicates any dropped item and can be further configured via the Mod Menu. 
This is just the first mod I've ever made, so if you want to help me fix any errors (reporting) in the mod, I'd appreciate it. ^^
The mod can only be used on a server (obviously).
